description_long: This is a tall, freestanding street clock with a dark wooden case and a classic, rectangular column design. The upper section houses a round clock face with black hour and minute hands, black Arabic numerals, and a white background, all protected by a glass cover. Below the clock face, a glass-fronted compartment reveals a long pendulum and two vertical rods, typical of traditional grandfather clocks. The base is wide and sturdy, with stepped molding for added stability and a touch of elegance. The sides and back are plain, with the wood grain visible and no additional ornamentation. The overall appearance is stately and traditional, suitable for public or communal spaces.
description: A tall, dark wooden street clock with a round, white-faced dial and visible pendulum, featuring a classic, elegant design. The front is glass-paneled, while the sides and back are plain wood.
description_view_0: Front view showing the round clock face, glass panel, and visible pendulum inside the wooden case.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain, dark wooden surface with no visible clock face or pendulum.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back panel of the clock, which is unadorned and made of dark wood.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with a plain wooden surface and no visible features.
attribute_clock_face_design: The clock face is round with a white background, black Arabic numerals, and two black hands for hours and minutes. The design is simple and functional, with no visible decorative elements or second hand.
attribute_mounting_type: freestanding post with a wide, stable base
attribute_location_context: Likely placed on an urban sidewalk, in a park, or at a plaza where pedestrians can easily view the time.
